name: Chicken Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 8 Chicken breast halves, skin and bone removed, pounded to 1/2 inch thick, cut into 1-1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a ziplock bag, combine the first six ingredients.
2. Add chicken in batches and shake to coat evenly.
3. Heat oil in a skillet.
4. Cook chicken, turning frequently, until browned and juices run clear, about 6-8 minutes.
